news.t: Quality Plus Growth: Elevating the Core With Precision ETFs
These ETF strategies were big winners in 2023. Here's where one CFRA analyst sees them going next year.

holdings.infoBox: QGRW is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.94%, Alphabet at 8.22%, Microsoft at 7.68%, Amazon.com at 6.97%, and Meta Platforms at 5.79%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. Quality Growth Fund (QGRW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree U.S. Quality Growth index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of 100 large-cap growth companies in the US that exhibit the strongest quality characteristics relative to their peers. QGRW was launched on Dec 15, 2022 and is issued by WisdomTree.
